title: Which Angels will appear in the remaining films
display_title: Which Angels will appear in the remaining films
wikitext:
[]: Which Angels will appear in the remaining films?             Quote Post by eva unit 04 » Mon Sep 24, 2007 11:14 am Going to make this a general thread for speculation on Angels for the remaining films. -Reichu okay, so this is my first post and first new topic(milestone moment ) i have been reading these forums for a while now and finally decided to join. basically in this topic you can just talk about what angels you think(or in some cases know) are going to be in the next movie. so here we go! i just recently re-watched the leliel episode (forgot name and number T_T) , and noticed that the scene from the new trailer of Misato stopping ritsuko is pretty much the same as the one in the episode!which means that leliel may well be a part of the new movie.sorry if this has already been mentioned!

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Mon Sep 24, 2007 11:22 am (in before "there is already a topic for this") Israfel: skipping Gaghiel, we can immediately place Asuka and Shinji together (after a bit of initial tension) so they can be even more like "wtf? why do we have to work together?) (it always seemed a bit stupid that they had already worked together on Gaghiel and expressed disinterest in doing it again) Leliel: first "wtf" moment, and tension at NERV over Shinji's rescue Bardiel: signifies a dramatic turn in the series, so this one's a must. Zeruel: continues the descent into madness, so this one's a must. I also considered Ireul, because it would show some NERV/Gehirn background, but it's unnecessary because they've already "blown their load" so to speak in the first movie by explaining some of this stuff. And for the record, I actually think 2.0 will take a drastically different turn, making this analysis irrelevant. But fanwank on, fanwankers!

[]:             Quote Post by eva unit 04 » Mon Sep 24, 2007 11:28 am interetsting stuff! sorry, i didnt know there was a topic for this , i'm new!i think what you said about skipping gaghiel may be the route they decide to take on this, it would make a interesting change of plot

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Sep 24, 2007 6:09 pm I give this two more posts before the anal retentive forum elders lock it up for invalid reasons. Anywho, I figure from trailer it could be Gaghiel, Leliel, Bardiel, and Zeurel all in one flick.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Mon Sep 24, 2007 7:14 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: I give this two more posts before the anal retentive forum elders lock it up for invalid reasons.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Sep 24, 2007 7:28 pm Whuzzat? I'm a forum elder and I don't have locking powers... Crap, I knew Aaron hated me.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Sep 24, 2007 7:40 pm He clearly meant mods guys.

[]:             Quote Post by omega_cc » Mon Sep 24, 2007 10:35 pm you know what would be the best turn for evangelion? Asuka not going suicidal, and parring with Shinji's sync rate and Rei can go sit in a corner and eat cheese. sorry rei-lovers but Asuka is the shizzles.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Sep 24, 2007 10:40 pm omega_cc wrote: you know what would be the best turn for evangelion? Asuka not going suicidal, and parring with Shinji's sync rate and Rei can go sit in a corner and eat cheese. sorry rei-lovers but Asuka is the shizzles.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Sep 24, 2007 10:48 pm omega_cc wrote: you know what would be the best turn for evangelion? Asuka not going suicidal, and parring with Shinji's sync rate and Rei can go sit in a corner and eat cheese. sorry rei-lovers but Asuka is the shizzles.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Sep 24, 2007 10:59 pm Hah. You said "shlick".

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue Oct 09, 2007 6:51 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: I give this two more posts before the anal retentive forum elders lock it up for invalid reasons. Anywho, I figure from trailer it could be Gaghiel, Leliel, Bardiel, and Zeurel all in one flick.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Oct 09, 2007 11:24 am Now, now, I'm sure that Rei loves cheese. (Seriously, though- I REALLY do think that Anno is aiming to derail our expectations; and that probably means messing with angel expectations. I think the whole story is going to veer off in a totally unprecedented direction.)

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Tue Oct 09, 2007 7:04 pm ...I'd sort of prefer to see all the angels in their Rebuild glory.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Oct 09, 2007 7:12 pm @ Barinax not going to happen I think as for Asuka not going insane I dont think she'll be spared unless annos going an entirly new way

[]:             Quote Post by jenova7 » Sat Dec 15, 2007 9:08 pm we all know that there will be 12 angels in total in rebuild, those already confirmed are: Adam, Lilith, Sachiel, Shamshel, Ramiel and Kaworu its almost certain that zeruel and bardiel will be present in 2.0 with a possible Israfel or Leliel, so that leaves 3 or 4 left for the other movies Gaghiel, Sahaquiel, Sandalphon, Matarael and Iruel will probably be scrapped which leaves only Arael and Arimsael, so there are still 1 or 2 angels left unnaccounted for... new ones perhaps?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Dec 15, 2007 9:25 pm That had been decided long ago. We have no idea what Angels will turn up, apart from Bardiel. Zeruel appears to be in, or another Angel/iteration of him that causes Shinji to go boso and dissolve in the Eva. Apart from that, we have no solid confirmation for Zeruel or any other Angel. There might be a non-MOTW Angel created specifically for the second movie, or it might be ONLY Zeruel and Bardiel, for all you know.

[]:             Quote Post by jenova7 » Sat Dec 15, 2007 9:40 pm in any case its going to be interesting finding out

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 15, 2007 10:45 pm Ignore any misspellings: Gaghiel, Israfel, Leliel, Bardiel, and Zeruel are my bets. Plus Glasses Girl=New SoL. :P (I like my theory so there.)

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Dec 16, 2007 3:32 am Sailor Star Dust (extract from split post) wrote: Anyway, uh, "Back on topic bitches!" to borrow a phrase from our "departed" Ojisan.
